title: B1: Dual pending root (team vs personal)
description: Make pending root layer-dependent. fab_extract_knowledge writes pending to `~/.fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/` when archive Skill classifies layer as personal, otherwise `.fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/`. fab_review.list enumerates from BOTH roots. Approve target = `~/.fabric/knowledge/<type>/` or `.fabric/knowledge/<type>/` per frontmatter layer. PENDING_BASE constant at extract-knowledge.ts:18 becomes a function `pendingBase(layer): string`. Anchor: rc5-rc6-handoff.json#code_anchors.extract-knowledge.ts:18.

files.change: Replace const with function pendingBase(layer: 'team'|'personal'): string; route writes accordingly
Enumerate both pending roots; merge results; tag origin in response
Derive target canonical dir from entry layer (personal → ~/.fabric/knowledge/<type>/, team → .fabric/knowledge/<type>/)

implementation: Define pendingBase(layer) function returning os.homedir() + '/.fabric/knowledge/pending' for personal else '.fabric/knowledge/pending'
Update fab_extract_knowledge: accept layer arg from caller (already passed by archive Skill); route file write through pendingBase(layer)
Update review.list: read entries from both roots; deduplicate by stable_id; preserve origin marker in response
Update review.approve: read entry's layer field from frontmatter; mv to corresponding canonical dir
Update review.reject/modify/defer: handle entries from both roots transparently
Add unit tests for personal vs team write paths, dual-root list enumeration, layer-correct approve target
Update CLI / Skill docs if dirpath assumptions appear in skill templates

reference.examples: Mirror existing layer attribute in agents.meta nodes

criteria: fab_extract_knowledge writes pending to ~/.fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/ when layer=personal; otherwise to .fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/
fab_review.list enumerates both pending roots and returns merged set with origin tag
fab_review.approve moves entry to ~/.fabric/knowledge/<type>/ or .fabric/knowledge/<type>/ per frontmatter layer
PENDING_BASE replaced with pendingBase(layer) function in extract-knowledge.ts
Unit tests cover both layer paths

rationale.chosen_approach: Layer-based dual root; mirrors existing 2-layer storage discipline (team vs personal)
decision_factors: Personal knowledge crosses projects → must live under ~
Team knowledge is project-scoped → must live in repo .fabric/
rationale.tradeoffs: Two enumeration round-trips on list; cheap relative to small KB size

manual_checks: fab_review.list with personal pending in ~/.fabric/knowledge/pending/ shows merged set

risks.fallback: Document Windows path expectations in README

key_functions.purpose: Return absolute path to pending root
